---
title: "My talk in Bogota (Nonlinear mixed models under the bayesian approach)"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2011-02-04"
categories:
  - "Bayesian Statistics"
  - "Modeling"
---

En el marco del 2nd International Workshop on applied Satatistics, [voy a exponer esta investigación](http://gutierrezandres.files.wordpress.com/2011/02/slides_working_sinitemize.pdf) que diserta de cómo ajustar modelos mixtos no-lineales bajo una perspectiva bayesiana.
